items.name: baoyu-design

items.name: gemma4-12b-vllm-sm120
items.description: Reproducible recipe: serve abliterated Gemma-4-12B (gemma4_unified) at 50-118 tok/s on no-NVLink Blackwell (SM120) via vLLM nightly + ModelOpt FP8/NVFP4 + MTP spec-decode.
